[[General/Legends|General]] '''Harrid Sendo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was a non-combat officer in the [[Destabilization|Destab Branch]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], and could access all kinds of information from where he worked

He had dealings with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]; each month [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] would give him a 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] notes in a [[Plastex/Legends|plastex]] envelope for informing Black Sun.

{{Char-stub}}
